column2: place20_bar <- ggplot(Assignment_3, aes(x = place20, fill = place20)) +
labs(x = "Place of Living", y = "Frequency", fill = "Place of Living") +
geom_text(aes(label = after_stat(count)), stat = "count", position = position_stack(vjust = 1), color = "black") +
geom_text(aes(label = scales::percent(after_stat(count / 44100))), stat = "count", position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), color = "black") +
